parameters.command: =timeout 900 lftp -e "set net:timeout 15; set net:max-retries 2; set net:reconnect-interval-base 5; set xfer:clobber on; set ftp:passive-mode true; set ftp:charset ISO-8859-1; set ftp:ssl-allow no; mkdir -f -p \"/dev_hdd0{{ $json.rutaDestino }}\"; put \"{{ $json.localPath }}\" -o \"/dev_hdd0{{ $json.rutaDestino }}{{ $json.filenameSafe }}\"; bye" -u \"root,root\" 192.168.1.26

=timeout 1800 lftp -e "set net:timeout 30; set net:max-retries 5; set net:reconnect-interval-base 10; set net:persist-retries 3; set xfer:clobber on; set ftp:passive-mode true; set ftp:charset ISO-8859-1; set ftp:ssl-allow no; mkdir -f -p \"/dev_hdd0{{ $json.rutaDestino }}\"; put \"{{ $json.localPath }}\" -o \"/dev_hdd0{{ $json.rutaDestino }}{{ $json.filenameSafe }}\"; bye" -u \"root,root\" 192.168.1.26
=ZIP="{{ $('Calcular filename').item.json.localPath }}"; EXT="/files/extracted/{{ $('Calcular filename').item.json.filename }}"; rm -f "$ZIP"; rm -rf "$EXT"; echo "limpieza TRUE: zip=$ZIP ext=$EXT"
=F="{{ $('Calcular filename').item.json.localPath }}"; if [ -f "$F" ]; then stat -c%s "$F"; else echo 0; fi
